_publications._publicationTitle: Oncogenic role of Merlin/NF2 in glioblastoma.

_contextSnippet: the percentage of Ki67-positive cells was higher in U251-S cells at high confluence (70%, p<0.01) compared to U251-R and astrocytes (33% and 41%, respectively
details: U251-S cells showed 70% Ki67-positive cells at high confluence (p<0.01) compared to U251-R (33%) and astrocytes (41%), indicating defective cell-contact inhibition
